name: Momentum Group AB (publ)
summary: Momentum Group AB (publ) supplies industrial consumables and components; and relates services to professional end users in the industrial and construction sectors in Sweden, Norway, Finland, and internationally. The company operates through Tools, Consumables, Workwear & Protective Equipment; and Components & Services segments. It offers hand tools, machinery, workwear, personal protective equipment, fastening elements, and workplace equipment; and spare parts for customers' production equipment, including bearings, seals, transmission, and automation products. The company also provides workwear, protective footwear, profile clothing, and promotional products. In addition, it offers related services, such as logistics, inventory optimization, maintenance planning, repair, consulting, customized product training program, permit control and monitoring, and on-call services. The company sells its products through a network of 121 stores in Sweden, 60 stores in Norway, and 37 stores in Finland. It serves customers in the industrial, civil engineering, construction, and public sectors; and process and manufacturing companies, including paper and pulp, sawmill, automotive, food, and mining companies, as well as workshops. Momentum Group AB (publ) was founded in 2016 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
